S1_avatar.notes: Excellent 90s yearbook. Multi-color laser beams (cyan, blue, magenta, pink) radiating from center — beautiful, dramatic composition. Navy sweater with plaid collar, glasses, natural warm smile. Face identity well preserved. Warm Kodak tones with visible grain. However portrait orientation rather than 1:1 square as specified in prompt — minor format deviation. The structured ### sections (Scene/Subject/Environment/Lighting/Camera) provided excellent detail control.

S2_edit.notes: Clean denim trucker jacket replacement. Background perfectly preserved — lake, mountains, sky all intact. Pose maintained, khaki chinos unchanged. Jacket has natural denim texture with visible stitching. The structured ### Target Change and ### Absolute Preservation sections worked effectively. Face slightly smoothed compared to original. Very similar quality to Skill A's S2.

S3_poster.notes: Perfect Art Deco poster with the most elaborate border design of all three skills. Fan motifs at all 4 corners plus bottom center diamond. All text correct. Gold silhouette violin, treble clef, trumpet with music staff lines at bottom. Navy + gold palette. The hex-code-adjacent color descriptions and Line 1-5 numbered text structure produced the most decoratively rich result.

S4_character.notes: Generated via MCP (gemini-2.5-flash). Full body Cyber-Knight, heroic stance. Obsidian armor with purple veins (more lightning-like organic pattern), triangular chest core. Cape with purple energy capillaries visible inside — unique detail from the detailed ### Character section. OSCORP neon partially visible, CYBERNETICS neon clear. Fire glow from left. Rain and puddles.

method: Ultra-detailed structured prompts with ### sections (Scene/Subject/Environment/Lighting/Camera/Negative), exact camera parameters
note: S4 used gemini-2.5-flash via MCP fallback due to API rate limiting. S1/S2/S3 used gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview.
